case_title: 150 POWELL STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. SEYEDEH F. MOOSAVI et al

NOTICE OF MOTION TO SUPPORT OF APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT OBTAINED ON MARCH 11, 2009 AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND ORDER ENTERED ON JUNE 11, 2009 AGAINST DEFT SEYEDEH F MOOSAVI AND FOR RETURN OF ALL MONIES LEVIED, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT MOOSAVI, SEYEDEH F. HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SEYEDEH MOOSAVI'S MOTION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT OBTAINED ON MARCH 11, 2009 AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND ORDER ENTERED ON JUNE 11, 2009 AGAINST DEFENDANT SEYEDEH F MOOSAVI AND FOR RETURN OF ALL MONIES LEVIED IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER, ACTING AS HER AGENT, KNEW DEFENDANT HAD BEEN SUED BUT DID NOT ACT DILIGENTLY TO RESPOND TO THE SUIT OR TO DEAL WITH ITS CONSEQUENCES. DEFENDANT'S NEGLECT IS NOT EXCUSABLE FOR PURPOSES OF SECTION 473 (B). PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Support Of Application To Set Aside Default Obtained On March 11, 2009 And Default Judgment And Order Entered On June 11, 2009 Against Deft Seyedeh F Moosavi And For Return Of All Monies Levied
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL K. LEE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF KEVIN D. FREDERICK,
TEL. NO. (650) 365-9800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NATHAN JAMES OF THE LAW FIRM OF SEYFARTH ET. AL., 749-5900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY SEYEDEH MOOSAVI.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SEYEDEH MOOSAVI'S Motion In Support Of Application To Set Aside Default Obtained On March 11, 2009 And Default Judgment And Order Entered On June 11, 2009 Against Defendant Seyedeh F Moosavi And For Return Of All Monies Levied IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER, ACTING AS HER AGENT, KNEW DEFENDANT HAD BEEN SUED BUT DID NOT ACT DILIGENTLY TO RESPOND TO THE SUIT OR TO DEAL WITH ITS CONSEQUENCES. DEFENDANT'S NEGLECT IS NOT EXCUSABLE FOR PURPOSES OF SECTION 473 (B). Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kevin Frederick, Esq. for Plaintiff: 150 Powell Street Homeowners Association.
Plaintiff's Witness Vincent P. La Froscia was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Seyedeh F. Moosavi as follows:
Damages $10,382.78
Attorney's Fees $1,375.00
Costs $375.50, for a total of $12,133.28
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Continued To Jul-17-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
